title: Italian Options White/Silver Organza Ribbon with Christmas Tree Print, Luxury, Wired Christmas Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Crafts, Wreaths, Tree Decorations, White, Silver Foil, 38 mm x 10 Metre Roll
features: WIRED RIBBON: This stunning organza ribbon is available in cream with a gold-foil or white with a silver-foil Christmas tree print. Wired edging provides maximum hold and versatile styling for festive crafts and gift wrapping.
ELEGANT ORGANZA: A lightweight luxury gift ribbon that exudes sophistication and elegance. Soft yet structured, it’s fray-resistant and perfect for floral displays and handmade bows.

VERSATILE CRAFTS: A must-have for your craft supplies, this seasonal Christmas tree ribbon will elevate cosmetics, scented products, millinery, chocolates, gift wrapping, paper crafts, wreaths, bouquets, and hampers.
QUALITY ASSURANCE: At Italian Options, our nylon organza ribbons are manufactured to the highest standards, ensuring gift wrap and craft accessories that last.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
description: Add a touch of premium festive charm to any craft project with our luxurious wired-edge organza ribbon, available in cream and white. Made from 100% polyester, this beautifully sheer Christmas ribbon features silver or gold-printed Christmas trees, with a wired edging designed to provide maximum hold and versatile styling options, adding structure and elegance to your creations. This seasonal ribbon is durable and versatile, ideal for a wide range of applications — from creating handmade bows, decorating gifts, wreaths, and hampers to embellishing craft projects — making every celebration unforgettable. Established in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company specialising in high-quality craft supplies and event decorations, helping you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special occasions — perfect for home crafters, DIYers, and event planners alike. Each organza ribbon measures 38 mm in width and is supplied on a 10-metre roll.
